communications.subject: Washington Public Records Act Request: Dataminr/Caroline Byrd Emails
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Washington Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

All emails between Caroline.Byrd@mil.wa.gov and @dataminr.com email addresses between August 1, 2025 and October 1, 2025, including attachments and associated metadata.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Rose Terse

title: Hamilton County sheriff office Tenn Partol staff roster request

communications.subject: Tennessee Public Records Act Request: Hamilton County sheriff office Tenn Partol staff roster request
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Date: April 22, 2026

Good afternoon, I hope this email finds you well and safe.

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act (Tenn. Code Ann. § 10‑7‑503), I respectfully request a current roster of sworn personnel assigned to standard patrol operations within the Hamilton County Sheriff’s Office, including all patrol districts, zones, and field operations units, but excluding special tactical teams and supervisory ranks, as of April 22, 2026.

For each deputy, please include:
- Full name
- Badge number or identifier
- Rank or title
- Patrol district, zone, or assignment area
- Unit assignment
- Shift assignment
- Hire date
- K‑9 designation (if applicable)

This request is made for non‑commercial, educational, and research purposes. I am not seeking any confidential personal identifiers or information protected by law. As I am unable to receive mailed records, I kindly request that all responsive documents be emailed.

Thank you for your time and consideration.
I hope to hear from you soon.

Sincerely,
Cameron Oliver
Jacksonville, FL
Email: oliverkidsjax@gmail.com
Phone: 904‑489‑9118

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Cameron John Oliver.
